mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.user_id, l.question, l.answer, l.knowledge_id, l.device_id, l.confidence, l.response_time, l.create_time, u.username, u.user_type AS userType, (CASE k.category WHEN '设备操作手册' THEN 'DEVICE_OPERATION' WHEN '实验流程' THEN 'EXPERIMENT_PROCESS' WHEN '安全规范' THEN 'SAFETY' WHEN '故障排查' THEN 'TROUBLESHOOTING' ELSE 'DEVICE_OPERATION' END) AS sessionType, (CASE WHEN l.knowledge_id IS NULL THEN 'ABNORMAL' WHEN l.confidence IS NOT NULL AND l.confidence < 0.3 THEN 'LOW_QUALITY' ELSE 'NORMAL' END) AS quality
ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN l.knowledge_id IS NOT NULL AND (l.confidence IS NULL OR l.confidence >= 0.3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal, SUM(CASE WHEN l.knowledge_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormal, SUM(CASE WHEN l.confidence IS NOT NULL AND l.confidence < 0.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lowQuality, SUM(CASE WHEN l.answer LIKE '%⚠️%' OR l.answer LIKE '%安全警告%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS safetyAlert
